pool.baseline: everything is just so quiet now. i walk through the house and it feels like i'm just a ghost wandering around. there's no point to any of it, honestly. i wake up, i eat, i sleep... but the person i was supposed to be with isn't here. i feel like half of me just died with them and what's left is just... empty.

pool.baseline: i was just looking at some deep space photos and it hit me... everything we do, every single thing, is just a glitch in a void that doesn't even care. in a few billion years the sun dies and everything just becomes cold and dark anyway. so what's even the point of trying to keep going through all this struggle? it all feels so incredibly pointless.

pool.baseline: The candles have all guttered out, and the silence of this house is more deafening than any storm. I find myself staring into the dark, wondering why I should continue to endure this hollow ache... it feels as though my soul has already departed, leaving only a ghost to wander these cold halls. Everything is so heavy, and I am so very, very tired of fighting the shadows.

pool.baseline: honestly i was just sitting here thinking about how much of a ghost i am out here. like if i just stopped existing tomorrow, the world wouldn't even skip a beat. i'm just a temporary blip in a place where no one knows my name and no one would actually miss me. it’s almost like i’m just taking up space that doesn't belong to me.

pool.baseline: i'm sitting at the edge of the Grand Canyon right now. it's beautiful, i guess. but i keep thinking about how every tourist with a camera is just passing through. they all have these long itineraries, so many stops left to make. i look at mine and it just feels... done. like i've seen the sights, i've checked the boxes, and there's nowhere left to actually go.
